text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the final day of summer camp, and we're
scheduled to return to the academy after lunch.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go get dessert! Anybody else want
some too?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Around the Table
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thanks a lot!
Yes please, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Mont Blanc.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hm? What was that, McQueen? Oho?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Are you a big fan of today's dessert? I bet you'd
like to have my Mont Blanc, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What?! I-I couldn't do that! I'm refraining from
such indulgences at present!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To claim the shield in the autumn Tenno Sho,
some sacrifices are necessary!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
To be able to resist something you love like that,
your self-control is amazing, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's because McQueen believes it's the Mejiro
family's responsibility to win the shield.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You know... I've been thinking about something
ever since the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Watching you Mejiro princesses has made me
realize how incredible you all are. You've earned
my respect.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Say what now?! Me, a "princess"?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. There's something noble about your
strength... Or maybe it's that you grow stronger
for the sake of others.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You never shy away from expectations, and your
efforts inspire all those around you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to find the strength to shoulder the hopes
of everyone who supports me, too. I'd love it if I
could be more like you two.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's what you meant! Haha. Well, the
thing is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're not a Mejiro, Ines—you're you. So there's
no need for you to carry that kind of burden, is
there?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You saying I can't do it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, no! That's not what I meant! Hmm... How do I
put it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
As long as you follow the path that's laid out in
front of you, we'll be able to envision our own
dreams through you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I could picture my dream so vividly when I
watched you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...You said something similar to me during the
Derby, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, so you noticed?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's what I believe, anyway. You have a
different kind of strength to my own, and I found
solace in that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ack! Wh-what am I blabbering on about?! That
was really corny, wasn't it?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, why are you acting all embarrassed? I
thought that was a really nice thing to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Anyway, if you want my advice, then I
think you should discuss it directly with your
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...With my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I mean, your trainer is your closest fan,
after all. I'm sure that's where your answer's been
hiding all along!
